meaning: v.低声歌唱,低声哼,低吟n.低唱,低吟,轻哼
examples: I croon this poem in delight.
Croon a song a woman, began to clean up the dishes.
The exaggerated drawl of bassist Oliver Sim precedes the more human-scale croon of guitarist Romy Madley Croft.
The upcoming karaoke device complete with microphone allows you to croon at home.
